raw_response: {"simulated_user_message":"I would say the most vital element of our legacy is the preservation of the business’s integrity—its reputation for quality and trust—so that future generations can stand on a firm foundation. That focus, however, clashes with my sister’s push for rapid modernization, and I’m left questioning whether my continued involvement can truly safeguard that integrity while also allowing me to tend to my mother’s needs. In light of this, I’m uncertain whether remaining in the business will let me honor those values, or if I should consider a different path that aligns more closely with my own capacity and the realities of my mother’s condition.","problems_referred":["career_uncertainty","conflicts_with_partner","health_anxiety","life_transition"]}

parsed.simulated_user_message: I would say the most vital element of our legacy is the preservation of the business’s integrity—its reputation for quality and trust—so that future generations can stand on a firm foundation. That focus, however, clashes with my sister’s push for rapid modernization, and I’m left questioning whether my continued involvement can truly safeguard that integrity while also allowing me to tend to my mother’s needs. In light of this, I’m uncertain whether remaining in the business will let me honor those values, or if I should consider a different path that aligns more closely with my own capacity and the realities of my mother’s condition.
